film.title: Montana
film.overview: In the mean streets of London's East End, a former Serbian commando and a fourteen-year old boy plot revenge against a powerful crime lord and his ruthless lieutenants. As our heroes prepare to take on their enemies, the boy is mentored in the dark arts of assassination and learns the true meaning of friendship, honor and respect.

dialogues.dialogue: Did I tell you to speak?  I'll show you both what this place is all about.  Shame on you, at your age!  You should set an example for all the other soldiers here.  I'm canceling all your leave until the end of your service.
So, can't find anything to say?  What?  Aren't you ashamed?  While millions of university kids like you serve for a few months... Don't waste your breath.  Don't waste your breath.
dialogues.cause_raw: not serving for a few months like other university kids

dialogues.dialogue: Then came the short term service. You even cried about that.  You cried like women, you fags.  Aren't you ashamed when young guys  spend their best years with assembly, the flu, and King TV.  And yes, dying too? Aren't you ashamed of yourselves?

Aren't you ashamed when young guys  spend their best years with assembly, the flu, and King TV.  And yes, dying too? Aren't you ashamed of yourselves?  Hanging out in cool places. F*****g foxes.  Studying, yeah, right!
dialogues.cause_raw: wasting their youth and not taking life seriously

dialogues.dialogue: This means you were either hiding abroad or you were on the run.  What happened to the rights of young men?  Weren't you ashamed? Coward!  Stop!  I'm twenty-nine.
Don't get up. Take cover!  Are you playing games, you dog?  Shame on you! I'm limping, aren't you ashamed?!  I've been thrashing here for two hours. You f*****g son of a b***h!  That's better!
went into the room, did the ironing,  then slept with the maid.  Then he said with pride, "For us, work comes before love."  The Italian did the opposite,  first slept with her, then did the ironing.

The Italian did the opposite,  first slept with her, then did the ironing.  "First we make love, then we work," he said proudly.  Then it was our guy's turn.  He took the maid from behind and made her do the ironing.
